basic_details.job_title: Burari Hospital Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Resident Posts
basic_details.short_information: Burari Hospital Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Burari Hospital. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the Burari Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC & ST and 3 years for OBC (Delhi Non Creamy Layer)

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with Post Graduate degree/DNB/Diploma or equivalent as per Residency Scheme in concerned specialty from a recognized University/Institute
qualification.details: MBBS with Post Graduate degree/DNB/Diploma or equivalent as per Residency Scheme in concerned specialty from a recognized University/Institute.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per 7th CPC guidelines as adopted by GNCT of Delhi
salary_details.details: As per 7th CPC guidelines as adopted by GNCT of Delhi

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Merit List

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Burari Hospital Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date. There is no separate application deadline mentioned for submission before the walk-in.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with a Post Graduate degree/DNB/Diploma or equivalent in the concerned specialty from a recognized University/Institute as per the Residency Scheme.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Senior Resident posts across various departments.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Burari Hospital Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Resident posts will be as per the 7th CPC guidelines as adopted by the GNCT of Delhi.

faq.question: Q7. Which departments have vacancies for Senior Residents?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in Microbiology, ENT, Ophthalmology, and Blood Bank departments.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Burari Hospital, Delhi. The exact address is 110084.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.
